name: @deluxebear/jimeng-cli
description: Authenticated Jimeng/Jianying web workflow CLI for image, video, audio, agent, and history operations.

scripts.check: node --check bin/jimeng.mjs && node --check lib/client.mjs && node --check lib/config.mjs && node --check lib/bdms-algorithm.mjs && node --check lib/signer.mjs && node --check lib/video.mjs && node --check lib/audio.mjs && node --check lib/image.mjs && node --check lib/media.mjs
